name: use-media-query
description: Track whether a CSS media query matches, reactively — for responsive behaviour in JS (mobile vs desktop, prefers-reduced-motion, prefers-color-scheme). SSR-safe and tearing-free via useSyncExternalStore.

intents: react to a media query in JavaScript
detect mobile vs desktop or prefers-reduced-motion
conditionally render based on a breakpoint
examples:
const isDesktop = useMediaQuery('(min-width: 768px)');
const reduceMotion = useMediaQuery('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)');
